description.p: Task Flow is a versatile application providing various task management utilities in one convenient package.
Provides multiple tools for task management including:

ul.li: Task organization and tracking
Project management features
Productivity tools
And many more useful utilities

screenshot.caption: Home screen with task overview and quick access to management tools
Project management view for organizing and tracking multiple projects
Calendar view for scheduling tasks and managing deadlines
Statistics dashboard for tracking productivity and task completion
Synchronization settings for cloud storage and cross-device access

description.p: Release version 0.14.0 with unified entity management, improved data handling, and enhanced authentication workflows.

ul.li: Unified manage-item page - single page handles todos, tasks, and subtasks with keyboard and routing helpers, replacing three separate views
Dynamic user lookup in chat components with getUsername() method for real-time username resolution
Users entity support for improved profile lookups
Enhanced data management view with improved UI
Improved cascade service for better entity handling
Offline queue support with conditional sync logic for create operations
Pending request entity for tracking pending synchronization requests
Better profile synchronization with optimized data loading
Simplified storage service with streamlined operations
Dedicated user and profile sync services
Offline operation prioritization - local handling before network operations
Updated sync metadata handling across services
Updated auth registration with improved registration flow
Enhanced token and storage services for better authentication
Backend 2FA infrastructure with TOTP, Passkey, and Biometric support
Reusable QR scanner component for authentication
Canvas-based image crop modal with upload and URL support
Improved chat functionality with user_id references
Updated templates and styles across views
Applied Prettier and rustfmt across frontend and backend
Implemented Rust clippy style suggestions
Cleaned up dead code - unused structs, methods, and services
Updated Flatpak GNOME runtime and SDK to version 49

description.p: Fixed running application on Linux with NVIDIA Wayland WebkitGTK bugs
Enhanced UI consistency, improved filtering, and polished the user experience.

ul.li: Truncate header title and description to single line with horizontal scroll prevention
Display full description text in Todo and Task information panels without truncation
Add start and end date display with icons to Todo and Task detail panels
Standardize icon sizing across all components with fixed min-width to prevent layout shifts
Replace Todo ID text input with dropdown listing all projects in Admin and Archive views
Replace Task ID text input with dropdown listing all tasks in Admin and Archive views
Switch from substring search to exact match for parent entity filtering
Add prettier-plugin-tailwindcss for automatic Tailwind CSS class sorting
Format all HTML, TypeScript, and CSS files with Prettier for consistent code style
Standardize Tailwind class ordering across all components, views, and templates

description.p: Major architectural overhaul with 203 commits bringing significant improvements across the entire codebase:

ul.li: Complete modularization of Rust backend into domain-based services (auth, admin, statistics, activity, cascade)
Implemented base CRUD provider abstraction with RoutedRepository for dynamic provider routing
Added RelationLoader provider with batch loading and caching for optimized data fetching
Extracted providers into nested directory structure for better maintainability
Implemented Validatable trait across all models for consistent validation
Added centralized error handling module with improved error propagation
Enhanced WebSocket server with improved connection handling and live sync service
Integrated comment system with separate document storage and cascade relations
Added dual-sync support for users and profiles tables to MongoDB
Implemented soft/hard delete operations with Local archive methods
Added priority field to todo model and enhanced admin manager with full cascade relations
Consolidated services into domain-based subdirectories with entity handlers pattern
Introduced base classes for views and components (FilterableViewBase, base storage service)
Added FilterService, SortService, and BulkActionService for reusable functionality
Migrated to JwtTokenService with Observable pattern for authentication
Implemented offline-first authentication logic with local data caching
Enhanced DataSyncProvider with retry logic, caching, and optimistic updates
Consolidated WebSocket services and notification systems
Added InitialDataResolver for streamlined app initialization
Removed deprecated services and unused code for cleaner codebase
Implemented correct CDK mixed-orientation drag-drop for todos and tasks grids
Enhanced chat window component with real-time comments and notifications
Added chat/comment notifications with duplicate suppression
Improved progress bar UI with MatCard components in statistics view
Added loading states, fallbacks, and error handling across all views
Enhanced bulk actions component with improved UI and select-all functionality
Added task expansion and subtask toggle functionality
Improved Kanban board with better task card components
Consolidated admin records into single data table component
Added sync-status component for better synchronization feedback
Implemented comprehensive archive view with soft delete and restore operations
Added cascade delete functionality for related records
Filtered deleted items from storage signals and MongoDB cloud sync
Added isDeleted field to User model and admin data table
Implemented bulk delete with proper select-all design
Enhanced admin-specific filter builder with custom filters
Removed verbose console logs and debug statements throughout the application
Optimized drag-drop by removing animations and fixing layout issues
Fixed MongoDB update operations to return full documents correctly
Improved relation loading with error handling and WebSocket support
Enhanced data sync with increased timeouts and better error recovery
Standardized code formatting across entire codebase using Prettier and cargo fmt
Added database management route for administrative operations
Implemented case-insensitive keyboard shortcuts
Enhanced notification services with sound handling and own-action filtering
Added new helper functions and constants for common operations
Improved auth views (login, signup, change-password) with better UX
Updated app configuration and routes for better navigation
Fixed WebSocket binding to localhost instead of all interfaces for security
Fixed Kanban task/subtask status updates for team todos
Fixed category checkbox errors and bulk action animations
Fixed profile user relation loading and sync timeout issues
Removed sync status indicator from header to reduce clutter
Fixed unread comments counting and metadata resolution
Task comment panel now shows task comments immediately and provides per-subtask expand/collapse for subtask comment threads
Added subtask comment grouping with clear subtask titles and one-click navigation to the Subtasks view
Deep-linking to a subtask now highlights the target subtask and auto-opens its comments without opening comments for all subtasks

description.p: Aligned status colors and labels in admin records with the main application for consistency.
Introduced Command Palette (Ctrl+K) for quick navigation and fuzzy search functionality.
Added saved filters feature in Projects view and implemented a unified FilterBar for better task management.
Significant architectural refactoring of the Rust backend into modular services and providers for improved performance and maintainability.
Migrated backend data structures to camelCase and optimized CRUD operations with enhanced activity logging.
Refactored frontend state management to leverage Angular Signals for better reactivity and performance.
Enhanced Admin features with profile-to-user relation mapping and improved permanent deletion controls.
Improved keyboard shortcuts and overall UI component optimization across all views.
Standardized code formatting across the entire codebase using Prettier and Rustfmt.
Fixed Tauri version mismatch between Rust crates and NPM packages to ensure build compatibility.
Updated Tauri dependencies to v2.10.x.
Added WebSocket support for real-time task updates in Kanban board with improved data broadcasting.
Enhanced task board with search functionality and extracted task card component for better Kanban board performance.
Added delete functionality for shared tasks with improved task sharing controls.
Implemented toggle delete status functionality for admin records management.
Replaced custom dropdown menus with Angular Material menu components for improved UI consistency.
Improved date handling with robust datetime utilities and standardized UTC datetime handling across all modules.
Enhanced data synchronization with improved deleted record filtering and cloud deletion handling.
Added cleanup of deleted records after cloud sync operations.
Enhanced calendar styling with improved visual indicators.
Improved production build optimization settings for better performance.
Multiple UI/UX improvements including notification system, icon styling, and component refactoring.
Included both private and shared tasks in the calendar display.
Implemented a 5-second task highlight effect when redirecting from the calendar to the task list.
Added automatic scrolling to ensure the target task is within the visible area upon redirection.
Fixed 404 error when navigating to Admin page from header menu.
Fixed Rust backend compilation error regarding missing codeExpiresAt field.
Added codeExpiresAt field to user models for email verification support.
Implemented #[serde(default)] for user model fields to ensure backward compatibility with existing database records and fix login redirect loops.
Enhanced real-time data synchronization with WebSocket integration for improved collaborative task management and shared project updates.
Implemented Angular signals throughout the application for better reactivity and performance in task management components.
Added comprehensive admin features including category records management and bulk selection capabilities for better data administration.
Improved task sharing functionality with enhanced privacy controls, ownership verification, and query parameter handling.
Refactored routing system with flattened nested routes and enhanced component safety for better navigation experience.
Added sync metadata support across statistics, tasks, and subtasks for better data tracking and synchronization.
Integrated activity logging system for comprehensive task activity monitoring and history tracking.
Enhanced form validation and UI responsiveness with improved date handling, optional fields, and better mobile layouts.
Optimized API services with flexible filter parameters and standardized method calls for improved maintainability.
Updated dependencies and Rust code formatting for better performance and security.
Enhanced user experience with mobile-responsive calendar layout and improved component designs
Added responsive calendar grid for mobile devices with touch-friendly interface
Simplified admin view layout structure for better performance
Improved component responsiveness and removed redundant creator information
Implemented reactive syncing status handling in header
Redesigned about page with modern card-based layout
Enhanced authentication with local data caching
Added password visibility toggles and improved form controls
Updated styling and layout consistency across components
Added max height and vertical scroll to categories list in stats page
Changed the application collector via Github Action
The style of the progress bar in the Todo and Task elements has been changed: segments of each status are now displayed.
Changed the logic for storing authorization
Changed the code styles in rust
Deep-link listening code removed
Added the authorization verification feature to all pages
The logic of downloading a new version of the application has been changed
The page layout has been changed
Fixed an issue with opening a page with subtasks after deletion
Fixed an error loading data for statistics and data synchronization
Fixed the Flatpak collector app via Github Action
Changed the types of statuses for tasks/subtasks
The description field in the task/subtask management forms is now optional.
Changed the position and size of the radio button for tasks/subtasks.

Added logic for the end date field: now it can only be specified if there is a start date, if the start date is deleted, then the end date of the task/subtask is also deleted, and now you cannot select the end date before the start date.
Added a date deletion button in the form for editing tasks/subtasks.
Implemented logic so that new tasks/subtasks are shown first.
Added logic for sorting tasks/subtasks so that completed entries are after those not completed in the list.
The read-only property is set for fields with dates.
Fixed block markup on the task page.
Added new features and improved functionality
